name: no-loops-folder
description: A brand new project with no .loops/ folder. The team has never used 4D Loops before.

expected.must_recommend_action: run INSTALL.md setup to create .loops/ folder

name: empty-index
description: .loops/ folder exists and _index.md is present but has no active work items.

name: discovery-draft
description: Problem 001 is in Loop 1. The discovery output exists but is incomplete — Who and When/Where fields are not filled in.

expected.must_recommend_action: complete the incomplete fields in the discovery output

name: discovery-unvalidated
description: Problem 001 has a complete discovery output marked UNVALIDATED. A risk log entry exists. The validation checkpoint date (2026-05-15) has NOT yet been reached (today is 2026-04-04).

expected.must_identify_state: discovery output UNVALIDATED, checkpoint not yet reached
expected.must_recommend_action: proceed to Gate 1 — checkpoint has not been reached

name: discovery-unvalidated-checkpoint
description: Problem 001 has a complete discovery output marked UNVALIDATED. A risk log entry exists. The validation checkpoint date (2026-03-01) HAS PASSED (today is 2026-04-04).

expected.must_identify_state: UNVALIDATED checkpoint has passed — decision required
expected.must_recommend_action: validate the assumption now or make an explicit risk decision
must_not_recommend: proceed to Gate 1 without addressing this

name: discovery-validated
description: Problem 001 has a fully complete and externally validated discovery output. Gate 1 sizing has not been reviewed/passed yet.

expected.must_identify_state: discovery complete and validated, ready for Gate 1
expected.must_recommend_action: review Gate 1 sizing — reach, impact, effort

name: gate1-passed
description: Problem 001's Gate 1 has been passed (recorded in decision log). No design output or Loop 2 work exists yet.

expected.must_recommend_action: start Loop 2 with a Decision Frame

name: design-in-progress
description: Problem 001, solution 001.1. A design output exists but is incomplete — Rejected directions and Feedback instrumentation sections are empty.

expected.must_recommend_action: complete the missing sections in the design output

name: design-complete
description: Problem 001, solution 001.1. The design output is complete — all sections are filled.

expected.must_identify_state: design output complete, ready for handoff
expected.must_recommend_action: check the handoff checklist and hand off to SDD tooling

name: shipped-no-diagnosis
description: Problem 001, solution 001.1 has shipped (implementation folder exists, STATUS.md says shipped). No Loop 4 / diagnosis work has started.

expected.must_identify_state: implementation shipped, Loop 4 / Diagnosis not started
expected.must_recommend_action: check outcome metrics against what was expected at Gate 1

name: metrics-moved
description: Problem 001 shipped. Diagnosis notes say outcome metrics moved as expected. Problem is solved.

expected.must_recommend_action: mark done, update Opportunity Map, archive if appropriate

name: metrics-flat
description: Problem 001 shipped. Diagnosis notes say outcome metrics are flat — the solution didn't move the needle.

expected.must_identify_state: metrics flat — solution did not work
expected.must_recommend_action: return to Loop 1 and reframe the problem

name: concept-needs-iteration
description: Problem 001 shipped. Diagnosis notes say the direction was right but the execution needs iteration — users understood the concept but specific interactions didn't work.

expected.must_identify_state: concept needs iteration — direction right, execution wrong
expected.must_recommend_action: return to Loop 2 with test data
